title: dbg123 pill primaries and must-change-password gates
description:
Primary actions on PipeSync, mobile, and client portal now use the dark pill style with orange accent underline (dbg123), matching the desktop hp-btn tokens from dbg122.

Login and app boot no longer skip the default-password flow: restoring a session or opening PipeSync or the portal with mustChangePassword set sends users back to login to set a new password first.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: dbg123: refresh ONBRAND and PIPEBUNTU primary pill styling in theme-profile.css and mobile color tokens.
Cache bust dbg123 on login bundle, portal runtime, PipeSync or mobile assets, and addon manifest entries.
Block PipeSync requireSession and client portal boot when mustChangePassword is still true.
Login (legacy and React): gate session resume on mustChangePassword; normalize snake_case flag on portal session.
